title: Pingora HTTP Request Smuggling Vulnerability
summary: Pingora's parsing of HTTP/1.0 and Transfer-Encoding requests is vulnerable to HTTP request smuggling (CWE-444). Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: High.

title: Apache HTTP Request Smuggling Vulnerability
summary: Apache's handling of HTTP/1.1 connection upgrades is vulnerable to HTTP request smuggling (CWE-444). Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: High.

title: Cache Poisoning Vulnerability in Pingora
summary: Pingora's default cache key construction is vulnerable to cache poisoning. Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: Medium.

title: UnQLite Library Vulnerability
summary: UnQLite for Perl embeds a potentially insecure version of the UnQLite library. Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: Medium.

title: Compress::Raw::Zlib Vulnerability
summary: Compress::Raw::Zlib includes a copy of the zlib library with potentially insecure versions. Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: Medium.

title: WordPress Plugin Vulnerabilities
summary: Multiple WordPress plugins are vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) and SQL Injection. Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: Medium.

title: IDC SFX2100 Satellite Receiver Vulnerabilities
summary: The IDC SFX2100 Satellite Receiver has multiple vulnerabilities, including setuid bit set on utilities and world-writable files. Exploit/patch status: Patch available. Urgency: Medium.
